using_expression:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (((equipment_activity_completions c
     JOIN equipment_activities a ON ((a.id = c.activity_id)))
     JOIN equipment e ON ((e.id = a.equipment_id)))
     JOIN projects p ON ((p.id = e.project_id)))
  WHERE ((c.id = equipment_activity_completion_images.completion_id) AND (p.firm_id = get_user_firm_id()) AND ((EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM users urole
          WHERE ((urole.id = auth.uid()) AND (urole.is_active = true) AND ((urole.role)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['firm_admin'::character varying, 'project_manager'::character varying, 'vdcr_manager'::character varying])::text[]))))) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM (users u
             JOIN equipment_team_positions tp ON ((lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM tp.email)) = lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM u.email)))))
          WHERE ((u.id = auth.uid()) AND (tp.equipment_id = e.id) AND ((c.department IS NULL) OR (tp.department = c.department))))) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM (users u
             JOIN project_members pm ON ((lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM pm.email)) = lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM u.email)))))
          WHERE ((u.id = auth.uid()) AND (pm.project_id = p.id) AND ((c.department IS NULL) OR (pm.department = c.department)))))))))
